## Checklist

* [ ] MR small and focused
* [ ] no out-of-scope change
* [ ] no opportunistic refactor
* [ ] no unsupported decision claim
* [ ] tests added or updated
* [ ] docs updated if necessary
* [ ] no secret
* [ ] no private data
* [ ] no unapproved external image
* [ ] diagrams only Mermaid or Python-generated images
* [ ] CI green
* [ ] validation received before merge
